checks.description: Mutually exclusive traffic-light phases: exactly one of red, yellow, green is high at any time.
checks.pass_condition: For every observed cycle, the sum of red, yellow, green signals equals 1.

checks.description: When pass_request is asserted while green is high, the counter output (clock) should be set to 10 within a bounded number of cycles.
notes: Based on contract assumption about pass_request and green.
checks.pass_condition: If pass_request=1 and green=1, then clock equals 10 within at most 5 cycles.
checks.trigger_condition: When pass_request transitions to 1 while green is observed high.

checks.description: When green transitions from high to low, the counter (clock) should be set to 60 within a bounded number of cycles.
notes: From contract assumption about green deactivation.
checks.pass_condition: If previous green (p_green)=1 and current green=0, then clock equals 60 within at most 5 cycles.
checks.trigger_condition: On detection of green falling edge.

checks.description: Post-reset output stabilization: after reset is deasserted, red, yellow, green, and clock should become defined (0/1) within a bounded number of cycles.
checks.pass_condition: All observed signals assume a defined 0/1 value within at most 10 cycles after reset release.
checks.trigger_condition: When reset signal transitions from asserted to deasserted.

unresolved_items: Spec/reset hint could not be mapped to a known reset port: The second always block handles the counting logic of the internal counter (cnt). The counter is decremented by 1 on every positive edge of the clock or negative edge of the reset signal. The counter values are adjusted based on various conditions:

Spec/reset hint could not be mapped to a known reset port: The final always block handles the output signals. It assigns the previous values (p_red, p_yellow, p_green) to the output signals (red, yellow, green) on the positive edge of the clock or negative edge of the reset signal.
